print("Files exist:", os.path.exists(qfile), os.path.exists(hfile))
with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
with open(hfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hdata = json.load(f)
len(qdata), type(qdata[0]) if len(qdata)>0 else None, list(qdata[0].keys())[:20] if len(qdata)>0 else None, len(hdata), type(hdata[0]) if len(hdata)>0 else None, list(hdata[0].keys())[:40] if len(hdata)>0 else None

# Let's reconstruct the Response_Context from the prompt.
response_context = """
قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم: "إن الشيطان يجري من ابن آدم مجرى الدم". 
وقال تعالى: "وَإِنْ كَادُوا لَيَفْتِنُونَكَ عَنِ الَّذِي أَوْحَيْنَا إِلَيْكَ لِتَفْتَرِيَ عَلَيْنَا غَيْرَهُ وَإِذًا لاتَّخَذُوكَ خَلِيلاً" [الإسراء:73].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ" [الأنبياء:58].
وقال تعالى: "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلَائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ" [الأنبياء:58].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].

وقال تعالى: "وَلَقَدْخَلَقْنَا الْإِنْسَانَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسِّسُ فِي نَفْسِهِ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْكُمْ وَلَكِنْ لا تُبْصِرُونَ" [ق:16].
قال: 
"""
# Check length
len(response_context)

# Define normalization and similarity functions
import re
from difflib import SequenceMatcher
ARABIC_DIACRITICS = re.compile("""[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]""")
TATWEEL = "\u0640"
PUNCT_RE = re.compile(r"[^\w\s\u0621-\u064A\u0660-\u0669\u0600-\u06FF]")  # but this removes punctuation including Arabic letters? let's do different approach

def normalize_arabic(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    # unify to NFC
    text = unicodedata.normalize('NFC', text)
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace(TATWEEL, '')
    # remove diacritics (harakat)
    text = ARABIC_DIACRITICS.sub('', text)
    # replace hamzas forms with bare alif, normalize initial alef with hamza to alif
    text = text.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    # replace taa marbuta with haa? maybe not.
    # replace alef maqsura with ya
    text = text.replace('ى','ي')
    # replace tatweel handled.
    # remove punctuation (keep Arabic letters and digits and spaces)
    # Let's keep Arabic letters (0621-064A) and spaces and digits
    text = re.sub(r'[^ \u0621-\u064A0-9]', '', text)
    # collapse spaces and lower-case (Arabic has no case)
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    return text

def seq_ratio(a,b):
    return SequenceMatcher(None, a, b).ratio()

def token_f1(a,b):
    # tokens are split on spaces
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    common = 0
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    for t in set(ta) & set(tb):
        common += min(ca[t], cb[t])
    prec = common / len(ta)
    rec = common / len(tb)
    if prec + rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec / (prec+rec)

# Let's prepare the inputs
user_snippet = "وَإِذْ قَالَ رَبُّكَ لِلْمَلائِكَةِ إِنِّي خَالِقٌ بَشَرًا مِنْ طِينٍ"
# FULL substring extracted from the response using provided indices
full_substring_extracted = full_substring  # from earlier slice
user_snippet, full_substring_extracted, normalize_arabic(user_snippet), normalize_arabic(full_substring_extracted)

# Search Quran DB for direct normalized match
norm_user = normalize_arabic(user_snippet)
norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_substring_extracted)

candidates = []
for v in qdata:
    ay = v.get('ayah_text','')
    if normalize_arabic(ay) == norm_user or normalize_arabic(ay) == norm_full:
        candidates.append(v)
len(candidates)

candidate = candidates[0]['ayah_text']
norm_candidate = normalize_arabic(candidate)
ratio_seq_full = seq_ratio(norm_candidate, norm_full)
ratio_seq_user = seq_ratio(norm_candidate, norm_user)
f1_full = token_f1(norm_candidate, norm_full)
f1_user = token_f1(norm_candidate, norm_user)
candidate, norm_candidate, norm_full, norm_user, ratio_seq_full, ratio_seq_user, f1_full, f1_user
